name: VEAZY Mouthpiece Set (4x)
summary: Keep your sessions fresh and your device performing at its best with the VEAZY Mouthpiece Set from Storz & Bickel.
description: Keep your sessions fresh and your device performing at its best with the VEAZY Mouthpiece Set from Storz & Bickel. Designed specifically for the VEAZY Vaporiser, these genuine replacement mouthpieces ensure smooth airflow, pure flavour, and a hygienic vaping experience every time. Ideal for regular maintenance or for sharing your device, each mouthpiece can be replaced in seconds—no tools or extra parts needed. Information verified from Storz & Bickel and confirmed through in-house testing. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
